signals.title: OpenPayd ontvangt MiCA-licentie voor crypto-diensten in Europa
signals.summary: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

signals.title: Spark plaatst 150 miljoen dollar stablecoin op Uniswap voor gedeelde liquiditeit
signals.summary: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

signals.title: Circle en Nomura verkennen stablecoin-settlement voor bedrijfsvreemdevaluta Japan
signals.summary: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

signals.title: ECB integreert niet-financiële vorderingen in algemeen onderpandstelsel
signals.summary: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures

signals.title: USDT0-stablecoin bereikt honderd miljard dollar transactievolume
signals.summary: USDT0, backed 1:1 by tethers, the largest stablecoin by market capitalization, is the third-largest holder of USDT.

signals.title: Stablecoins: zoekvolume daalt 54% na groeiomslagpunt in 2025
signals.summary: The decline in search volumes this month coincides with aggregate stablecoin supply having reversed its 10-month expansion.

signals.title: Uniswap en Spark werken aan stablecoin-valuutamarkt
signals.summary: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry

signals.title: Spark en Uniswap lanceren stablecoin-platform FX Layer met 150 miljoen migratie
signals.summary: Spark is establishing a "liquidity foundation" for the new pool by migrating $150 million from its USDS ecosystem to Uniswap v4.
